author: Stateroom
text:
Document delivery modes, target_branch, and forge-gated flow

Add a README "Delivery Modes" section (local-squash vs deferred) with worked examples for both, the previously-undocumented current-branch-at-root target fallback, the BC caveat, and a forge-plugin vs issue-tracker-plugin distinction. Add delivery/target_branch/min_bl_version to the config reference. Add a SKILL.md "Forge-gated review" section and extend the lifecycle diagram with the deferred-mode branch. Both docs link the SPEC.
